mapper.select:
select p.post_id, p.member_id, p.place_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.readcount, p.category, m.nickname as nickname from post p join member m on p.member_id = m.member_id left join image i on i.post_id = p.post_id and i.sort_order = 0
and p.category = #{category}
and (p.title like concat('%', #{q}, '%') or m.nickname like concat('%', #{q}, '%'))
order by p.post_id desc

select p.post_id, p.member_id, p.place_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.readcount, p.category, m.nickname as nickname, pl.title as placeName from post p join member m on p.member_id = m.member_id left join place pl on p.place_id = pl.place_id where p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: update post set readcount = readcount + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: insert into post (member_id, place_id, title, content, category) values (#{memberId}, #{placeId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category})
mapper.update: update post set title= #{title}, content= #{content}, category = #{category}, place_id = #{placeId} where post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: insert into image (post_id, image_url, sort_order) values (#{postId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: select c.comment_id, c.content, c.depth, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.parent_id, c.post_id, c.member_id, case when pl.member_id = c.member_id then concat(pl.title, '사장') else m.nickname end as member_name, case when pl.member_id = c.member_id then 1 else 0 end as owner_comment from comment c join member m on c.member_id = m.member_id join post p on c.post_id = p.post_id left join place pl on p.place_id = pl.place_id where c.post_id = #{postId} order by case when c.parent_id is null and pl.member_id = c.member_id then 0 else 1 end, coalesce(c.parent_id, c.comment_id) asc, c.parent_id is not null, c.comment_id asc

select c.comment_id, c.content, c.depth, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.parent_id, c.post_id, c.member_id, m.nickname as member_name from comment c join member m on c.member_id = m.member_id where c.comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: insert into comment (content, depth, parent_id, post_id, member_id) values (#{content}, #{depth}, #{parentId}, #{postId}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: select place_id as placeId, title as name, place_type as placeType from place where title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by title asc limit 10
select pl.member_id from post p join place pl on p.place_id = pl.place_id where p.post_id = #{postId}
